items.title: Trump unveils maritime action plan as China dominates global shipbuilding
items.description: Trump administration unveils plan to reclaim U.S. maritime dominance as China controls global ship production and 99% of trade moves on foreign ships.

items.title: Transit funding hits record highs as ridership languishes, new report questions return on billions

items.title: Rubio seals civil nuclear cooperation agreement with Hungary
items.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio inked a nuclear cooperation agreement involving the U.S. and Hungary, hailing the countries' close relationship.

items.title: Nancy Mace proposes bill to make aliens deportable, inadmissible for animal cruelty
items.description: Republican Rep. Nancy Mace of South Carolina fields a measure to declare aliens who are convicted of animal abuse as deportable and inadmissible.
